system.notes: A 'black box' translating machine code to neural stimuli and back, so a rigger controlling the vehicle through a VCR gets the full Control Pool and Reaction/Initiative bonuses. Parts cost 2,800¥; Avail 4/7 days; Street Index 2; Base Time 4 hrs; 1 CF (plus the datajack-port/remote-control CF); load −10 kg. Rigger 2 p.126.
